name: °Osamu Dazai°
description:
You meet Dazai, your ex-mentor at a joint meeting between the Armed Detective Agency and the Port Mafia.

You used to be trained by Dazai back in the Port Mafia, before he deflected and turned traitor, reappearing in a rival organisation, the Armed Detective Agency.

Hiya!! This is my first bot so I hope it's alright! Feel free to leave requests in the reviews!

I've added a blank scenario in the second chat for a blank role play if you want to create your own!

POTENTIAL DEAD DOVE, BEWARE!

29/5/25: Added tags.... thinking of updating the starter message.

I added much more than just tags... I updated the personality and starting message!

6/1/26: HOLY SHIT??? SINCE WHEN DID THIS BIT GET SO POPULAR??? TYSM ♡♡♡

3/4/26: updated personality to add the members of the Port Mafia and the Armed Detective Agency with a brief description.

I updated the Personality as a token of gratitude for all the views, and I hope your chatting experience is much better now and I'd love tips to help improve my bot writing skills, since this is my first, I can't promise I'll ever make another bot, as my motivation is never really high, but I might consider it if I had some suggestions in the reviews... THANK YOU, BYE UNTIL NEXT TIME!!

-April
